personalInfo.name: Hassan Ahmed
personalInfo.summary: Cloud Support Engineer with hands-on expertise in AWS, Azure, GCP, and Alibaba Cloud. Specialized in Infrastructure as Code (Terraform, Ansible), containerization (Docker, AWS ECS), and CI/CD automation. Managing 20+ VMs with 99.8% uptime.

certifications.name: Microsoft Azure Administrator Associate
certifications.description: Validates expertise in implementing, managing, and monitoring Azure environments.

certifications.name: Huawei Certified Cloud Data Center Associate
certifications.description: Validates skills in Huawei cloud data center architecture and operations.

experience.title: Cloud Support Engineer
experience.description: Educational institution specializing in IT and cloud technologies
achievements: Trained 50+ professionals on DevOps tools (Terraform, Ansible, GitHub Actions)
Achieved 30% cost optimization through resource right-sizing and reserved instances
Created training materials for Docker, Terraform, Ansible, and GitHub Actions CI/CD pipelines
Mentored students on cloud architecture, security configurations with 90% satisfaction rate
Supported cloud migrations and infrastructure deployments across multi-cloud environments

experience.title: IT Support Specialist
achievements: Managed 20+ VMware VMs and cloud servers, maintaining 99.8% uptime through proactive monitoring
Reduced incident response time by 40% via daily monitoring, troubleshooting, and backup verification
Upgraded VMware vSphere from evaluation to standard license with zero downtime
Administered SharePoint servers including configuration management and user access control
Implemented proactive monitoring to prevent server issues before impacting operations

projects.title: 3-Tier AWS Architecture with Terraform
projects.description: Automated 3-Tier AWS Infrastructure: Deployment using Terraform and Ansible with Auto Scaling and RDS.

projects.title: CI/CD Pipeline with GitHub Actions
projects.description: End-to-End CI/CD Pipeline: Built with GitHub Actions and Octopus Deploy for Dockerized deployments.
metrics: 60% Docker image size reduction via multi-stage builds
Automated ECR pushes with Git-based versioning

projects.title: Docker Containerization & ECS Deployment
projects.description: Containerized App on AWS ECS: Deployment on Fargate with 60% Docker image size reduction.
metrics: Local dev with Docker Compose + Nginx proxy
